title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Goibibo Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Goibibo Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Goibibo Advisory Limited family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Goibibo Advisory Limited:
Goibibo Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Goibibo Advisory Limited!
